name: MiX Telematics Fleet Management and Vehicle Tracking API
what_it_does: MiX Telematics fleet management and vehicle tracking REST API for fleet operators, insurance companies, and logistics businesses across Africa, Middle East, Brazil, Australia, UK, and US to access real-time vehicle location, driver behavior scoring, fuel management, maintenance scheduling, and compliance reporting — enabling automated fleet monitoring, driver coaching, vehicle utilization optimization, and commercial vehicle compliance through MiX Telematics' enterprise fleet intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage vehicle tracking for real-time fleet location automation, handle driver behavior for safety scoring and coaching automation, access fuel management for fuel consumption optimization automation, retrieve maintenance alerts for vehicle service scheduling automation, manage compliance for HOS and driver regulation automation, handle trip analysis for route efficiency reporting automation, access geofencing for fleet boundary alert automation, retrieve accident detection for incident response automation, manage asset utilization for fleet productivity reporting automation, and integrate MiX Telematics with dispatch systems, insurance platforms, and fleet maintenance software for enterprise fleet management automation.
use_cases: Monitoring real-time fleet vehicle locations and driver behavior for African and emerging market fleet automation agents
Accessing driver safety scores and fuel consumption data for fleet insurance telematics program automation agents
Managing commercial vehicle compliance and hours-of-service reporting for fleet operations automation agents
Integrating MiX Telematics fleet data with ERP and dispatch systems for logistics network optimization automation agents
not_for: Personal vehicle tracking without fleet context (MiX Telematics serves commercial fleet operators)
Ride-sharing platform operations (MiX focuses on commercial vehicles, not ride-hailing logistics)
Non-commercial light vehicle insurance without fleet contract (MiX targets fleet operators)
best_when: An African, Middle Eastern, or global fleet operator, insurance company, or logistics business wanting AI agents to access real-time vehicle tracking, driver behavior data, and fleet analytics through MiX Telematics' enterprise fleet management platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE FLEET CONTRACT REQUIRED: MiX Telematics API requires enterprise fleet customer agreement; automated open API access assumption creates no available endpoint; automated must be MiX Telematics fleet customer or integration partner. HARDWARE DEVICE REQUIRED: MiX Telematics requires MiX-branded telematics device installed in each vehicle; automated software-only tracking assumption creates no vehicle data; automated must have MiX telematics hardware installed and activated in fleet vehicles. DEVICE PROVISIONING TIMELINE: New device provisioning and activation takes time; automated instant data access assumption after hardware purchase creates wait for device activation; automated must plan for device provisioning timeline. DATA SOVEREIGNTY IN AFRICA: Some African countries have data localization requirements; automated data storage assumption without localization creates regulatory issue in countries like Nigeria or South Africa.

auth.notes: MiX Telematics uses OAuth2 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Midrand, South Africa HQ. JSE and NYSE listed (MIXT). Founded 1995. Products: Fleet tracking, driver behavior, fuel management, maintenance, compliance (HOS/ELD), accident detection, video telematics. SDKs: None public. Operations in Africa, Middle East, Brazil, Australia, UK, US. 786,000+ subscribers. Enterprise fleet intelligence platform. Competes with Geotab for global fleet management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved integration partners; production requires fleet contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-vehicle/month subscription; hardware purchase or rental; enterprise contracts; integration partner pricing
pricing.notes: Midrand ZA. JSE + NYSE:MIXT. Per-vehicle subscription. 786,000+ subscribers. Africa/global fleet.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth2 client; real-time tracking and reporting APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: MIX HARDWARE IS MANDATORY: MiX Telematics API only serves data from MiX-branded telematics devices; automated hardware-agnostic tracking assumption creates no data for non-MiX hardware; automated must have MiX telematics devices installed and activated in fleet vehicles

VEHICLE ACTIVATION DELAY: New vehicles with MiX devices take time to activate and appear in platform; automated instant data availability assumption creates no_data for recently activated vehicles; automated must implement vehicle activation status check before expecting data

REAL-TIME EVENTS VS REPORTS: MiX API provides both real-time events (vehicle movements) and batch reports (trip summaries, driver scores); automated single data type assumption misses complementary data streams; automated should implement both real-time event streaming and scheduled report retrieval

DRIVER ID DEVICE REQUIRED: Driver behavior scoring requires driver ID key/tag or login to identify drivers vs vehicles; automated vehicle-only tracking assumption creates unidentified driver attribution; automated must configure driver ID system for driver-level behavior analysis

COUNTRY-SPECIFIC COMPLIANCE DATA: MiX provides region-specific compliance data (HOS in US, tachograph in EU, road transport in Africa); automated single compliance standard assumption creates country-specific compliance gap; automated must configure country-appropriate compliance reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fleet telematics. POPIA, GDPR-UK, LGPD, country-specific transport. OAuth2. Africa/Global. Vehicle and driver tracking data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fleet telematics. POPIA, GDPR, LGPD. OAuth2. Africa/Global. Vehicle location and driver behavior data.
